proposed_hypotheses.text: A 1-SD increase in `age_years` is associated with higher adjusted mean `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ all non-identifier main-effect covariates; continuous variables standardized except ecog_ps.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `age_years` was +1.750 months (SE 0.004, p=<1e-300), supporting longer PFS at older age.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `stage_iv` have lower adjusted mean `pfs_months` than patients without `stage_iv`.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ all non-identifier main-effect covariates; continuous variables standardized except ecog_ps.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `stage_iv` was -1.361 months (SE 0.008, p=<1e-300), supporting shorter PFS in stage IV disease.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each 1-point increase in `ecog_ps` is associated with lower adjusted mean `pfs_months`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving `treatment_regorafenib` have higher adjusted mean `pfs_months` than patients not receiving `treatment_regorafenib`.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: pfs_months ~ all non-identifier main-effect covariates; continuous variables standardized except ecog_ps.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `treatment_regorafenib` was +0.943 months (SE 0.010, p=<1e-300), supporting a strong positive main association.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `treatment_regorafenib` and `pfs_months` is smaller in patients with `kras_mutation` than in patients without `kras_mutation`.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: main-effect model plus simultaneous treatment_regorafenib interactions with kras_mutation, right_sided_primary, standardized cea_ng_ml, braf_v600e, and nras_mutation.
analyses.result_summary: In the simultaneous regorafenib interaction model, the `treatment_regorafenib:kras_mutation` coefficient was -1.763 months (SE 0.017, p=<1e-300), supporting reduced regorafenib-associated PFS in KRAS-mutated disease.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `treatment_regorafenib` and `pfs_months` is smaller in patients with `right_sided_primary` than in patients without `right_sided_primary`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `treatment_regorafenib` and `pfs_months` is larger in patients with `nras_mutation` than in patients without `nras_mutation`.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: main-effect model plus simultaneous treatment_regorafenib interactions with kras_mutation, right_sided_primary, standardized cea_ng_ml, braf_v600e, and nras_mutation.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `treatment_pembrolizumab` and `pfs_months` is larger in patients with `msi_high` than in patients without `msi_high`.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: main-effect model plus the stated treatment-by-marker interaction.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `treatment_pembrolizumab:msi_high` interaction was +0.058 months (SE 0.049, p=0.232), so MSI-high enrichment for pembrolizumab-associated PFS was not supported.

The positive association between `treatment_cetuximab` and `pfs_months` is smaller in patients with `right_sided_primary` than in patients without `right_sided_primary`.
The positive association between `treatment_bevacizumab` and `pfs_months` is larger in patients with `liver_mets` than in patients without `liver_mets`.

analyses.code: Adjusted OLS: main-effect model plus the stated treatment-by-marker interaction.
